hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.test\.ts\|\.spec\.ts'; then echo 'TEST QUALITY CHECK: Verify this test file has NO theatrical anti-patterns: .catch(() => false), || true, toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0), conditional expects without else. Each expect() must be able to FAIL.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then echo 'POST-COMMIT: verify lint-staged stash list and check for orphan stashes'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'npm run build'; then echo 'POST-BUILD: Check exit code. If prerender errors, check for missing force-dynamic or env var issues.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'npm test\|npx vitest\|npx playwright'; then echo 'POST-TEST: Review failures before proceeding. Do not skip failing tests.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'vercel --prod'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use CI/CD pipeline (gh pr create + merge) instead of direct vercel --prod'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push.*--force'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Force push is dangerous.'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q -- '--no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCKED: --no-verify bypasses safety hooks. Fix the underlying issue instead.'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'supabase db push'; then echo 'WARNING: supabase db push applies migrations to remote DB. Verify target environment first.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gh pr create|vercel deploy'; then BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot deploy from main/master directly.'; exit 2; fi; fi

INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; for f in .env .mcp.json package.json tsconfig.json vercel.json playwright.config.ts; do if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "$f"; then echo "WARNING: Writing to config file $f. Use Edit tool for surgical changes."; break; fi; done
cat docs/ai-state/session-state.json 2>/dev/null && echo '---SESSION STATE LOADED---' || echo '---NO PREVIOUS SESSION---'
